failure.message: assert 3 == 2 + where 3 = len([<tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B379156E0>, <tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B3798A330>, <tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B377E3F00>])

testcase.name: test_queryset_values
test_queryset_first_last
testcase.failure:
sample_users = [<tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B379B24D0>, <tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B37....test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B379C69D0>, <tests.test_orm_queryset.QSUser object at 0x0000013B37987550>]
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_queryset_first_last(sample_users): first_user = await QSUser.order_by("name").first() assert first_user.name == "Alice"
> last_user = await QSUser.order_by("name").last() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'QuerySet' object has no attribute 'last'
tests\test_orm_queryset.py:75: AttributeError
